implementation_drift.description: Noted in 07 results: philsci-archive 'gauge potentials' (plural) should match 'gauge potential' content_word as substring. So that paper is overlap=2, forced hit, not the overlap=1 miss I initially listed. The corrected count would be 6 hits/3 forced. Inline correction noted. Verdict unchanged.

honest_note: Aharonov-Bohm + neural network attention is not directly published (search found no direct paper). The Aharonov-Bohm gauge-potential framing might add formal structure to a phenomenon (low-attention token influence) that is empirically studied via attention-sink + residual-stream-architecture work. This is one of the cleaner candidates so far, though still FAIL because the empirical phenomenon is already partially mechanized.
